texto: Personally I like going places where I don't speak the language, don't know anybody, don't know my way around and don't have any delusions that I'm in control. Disoriented, even frightened, I feel alive, awake in ways I never am at home.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Mewshaw: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Personally I like going places where I don't speak the language, don't know anybody, don't know m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, travel, personally pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e reflexao.
